title: Digital Asset Investing
description: Buying, building, and exiting web properties as an investment strategy ... the mechanics of acquiring undervalued sites and growing them with purpose.
intro: Digital assets can be acquired the same way any asset can ... buy undervalued, build up, hold for cash flow, or sell at a gain. The market for websites and domains has matured. Platforms exist. Brokers exist. Multiples are somewhat predictable. This section covers the actual mechanics: what to look for when buying, what to avoid, how to think about hold vs. exit, and what makes a digital property worth owning.

seo.title: Digital Asset Investing ... AI Now Guide
seo.description: The mechanics of buying, building, and selling web properties as investable digital assets.
